---
title: "Get IOU results"
author: "Maggie Church"
date: "2026-03-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(terra)
library(sf)
```

```{r}
all_sf <- st_read(here("data/accuracy_assessment/all_est_obs_clouds/all_est_obs_clouds.shp"))
```

```{r}
# Split into observed and estimated by product
ponds_obs   <- all_sf |> filter(type == "observed")
ponds_est   <- all_sf |> filter(grepl("estimated", type))
clouds      <- all_sf |> filter(grepl("clouds", type))

product_map <- c(
  postproc10 = "estimated_ours",
  dswe_cons  = "estimated_cons",
  dswe_agg   = "estimated_agg",
  dw         = "estimated_dw",
  jrc        = "estimated_jrc"
)

clouds_type_map <- c(
  postproc10 = "clouds_ours",
  dswe_cons  = "clouds_cons",
  dswe_agg   = "clouds_agg",
  dw         = "clouds_dw"
)
```

Looootsss of debugging went into this
```{r}
compute_ious <- function(obs, pred, clouds, source_name, ds) {
  
  obs  <- obs  |> st_make_valid() |> st_cast("POLYGON")
  pred <- pred |> st_make_valid() |> st_cast("POLYGON")
  
  # mask clouds from observed ponds (except for jrc which has no clouds)
  # now "obs" will only contain cloudless or partially clouded ponds 
  cloud_type <- clouds_type_map[source_name] |> unname() #get cloud product name
  
  if (!is.na(cloud_type) && !is.null(clouds)) { 
    # create cloud mask
    cloud_mask <- clouds |>
      filter(type == cloud_type) |>
      st_union() |>
      st_make_valid() 
    
    if (length(cloud_mask) > 0) {
      obs <- obs |>
        # remove clouds
        st_difference(cloud_mask) |>
        # Keep only non-empty geometries
        st_make_valid() |>   
        filter(!st_is_empty(geometry)) |>
        st_collection_extract("POLYGON") |> 
        #st_collection_extract("POLYGON", warn = FALSE) |>
        # unionize ponds that got split by clouds 
        group_by(Plot, rownum) |>   
        summarise(geometry = st_union(geometry),
                  pond_size = first(pond_size)) |>  
        ungroup() 
    }
  }
  
  if (nrow(obs) == 0) return(tibble())
  
  # Precompute spatial intersections (faster)
  intersection_index <- st_intersects(obs, pred)
  
   # initialize empty vector where nrow = number of observed ponds
  iou_vals <- numeric(nrow(obs))
  
  # for each obs pond that intersects an estimated pond(s), calculate iou
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(obs))) {
    
    # get estimated ponds that intersect this observed pond
    idx <- intersection_index[[i]]
    
    # if there's an overlapping estimated pond, calculate iou
    if (length(idx) == 0) {
          iou_vals[i] <- 0
      } else {
        pred_overlap <- pred[idx, ]
        
        # calculate intersection
        intersection_area <- sum(
            sf::st_intersection(
              sf::st_geometry(obs[i, ]), 
              sf::st_geometry(pred_overlap)
            ) |>
            sf::st_make_valid() |>
            sf::st_area()
          )
        
        # calculation union
        union_area <- 
          sf::st_union(
            sf::st_geometry(obs[i, ]), 
            sf::st_geometry(pred_overlap)
          ) |>
          sf::st_make_valid() |>
          sf::st_area()
        
        # store IoU for this observed pond
        iou_vals[i] <- as.numeric(intersection_area / union_area)
      }
  }
  
  obs <- obs |> 
    mutate(
      pond_size_ha = pond_size * 0.0001,                # total pond area in ha
      pond_cloudless_ha = as.numeric(st_area(geometry)) * 0.0001  # after clouds removed
    )
    
  tibble(
    Plot                  = obs$Plot,
    dataset               = ds,
    source                = source_name,
    pondid                = obs$rownum,        
    pond_swx_ha           = obs$pond_size_ha,
    pond_swx_ha_cloudless = obs$pond_cloudless_ha,
    iou                   = iou_vals
  )
}
```

Get iou for each pond -- map function over each test survey ("ds") and product
```{r}
iou_results <- purrr::map_dfr(c("brood16", "2022", "2024"), function(ds) {
  
  obs_ds    <- ponds_obs |> filter(dataset == ds)

  # get ponds and clouds for a given product
  purrr::map_dfr(names(product_map), function(src) {
    
    pred_ds <- ponds_est |> 
      filter(type == product_map[[src]], dataset == ds)
    
    cloud_type <- clouds_type_map[src] |> unname()

    clouds_ds <- if (!is.null(cloud_type)) {
      clouds |> filter(type == cloud_type, dataset == ds)
    } else {
      NULL
    }

    compute_ious(obs_ds, pred_ds, clouds_ds, source_name = src, ds = ds)
  })
})

iou_results <- iou_results |> distinct()
```

```{r}
write_csv(iou_results, here("data/accuracy_assessment/iou_results.csv"))
```
